summary: Tested NEW Preventivi Commerciali (Smart Quote) module - 18 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed. Fixed a bug in run_compliance() where None values for height_mm/width_mm caused 500 errors. Full CRUD, thermal compliance validation with NormaCore ThermalValidator, and PDF generation all working correctly.

fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: run_compliance() used .get(key, default) which doesn't handle explicit None values - changed to 'or' fallback
fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed td.get('height_mm', 2100) to td.get('height_mm') or 2100 for all thermal parameters

issues: Minor: Console warning about missing Description for DialogContent (accessibility)

backend_api.GET /api/preventivi/: PASS - Returns empty list for new user, requires auth (401 without)
backend_api.POST /api/preventivi/: PASS - Creates preventivo with auto-generated PRV-YYYY-NNNN number, calculates totals, auto-calculates compliance_status
backend_api.GET /api/preventivi/{prev_id}: PASS - Returns preventivo with totals and compliance details
backend_api.PUT /api/preventivi/{prev_id}: PASS - Updates lines and recalculates totals/compliance
backend_api.DELETE /api/preventivi/{prev_id}: PASS - Deletes preventivo, returns 404 on subsequent GET
backend_api.POST /api/preventivi/{prev_id}/check-com: PASS - Validates thermal lines against zone limits
backend_api.GET /api/preventivi/{prev_id}/pdf: PASS - Returns PDF with commercial offer + technical annex

thermal_compliance.triplo_be_argon Zone E: PASS - Returns compliant with improved Uw
thermal_compliance.singolo Zone E: PASS - Returns NOT compliant (very high Uw)
thermal_compliance.compliance results fields: PASS - Returns line_id, description, uw, zone, limit, compliant, glass_label, frame_label

frontend.Preventivi nav item: PASS - Shows in sidebar with ClipboardList icon
frontend./preventivi page: PASS - Loads with data-testid='preventivi-page', shows 'Nuovo Preventivo' button
frontend.Preventivo editor: PASS - Has subject, client, validity, payment fields, lines table
frontend.Lines table: PASS - Has description, dimensions, qty, price, vat, total columns
frontend.Thermal button: PASS - Thermometer icon opens thermal drawer
frontend.Thermal drawer: PASS - Has glass/frame/spacer/zone dropdowns, confirms/removes thermal data
frontend.Compliance banner: PASS - Shows red banner with 'Uw troppo alto!' for non-compliant
frontend.Compliance detail table: PASS - Shows Voce, Vetro, Telaio, Uw, Zona, Limite, Esito columns
frontend.PDF download: PASS - Downloads PDF with correct filename

critical_code_review_comments: ThermalData model correctly defines optional fields with defaults for zone='E' and frame_width_mm=80
run_compliance() now correctly handles None values with 'or' fallback pattern
PDF generation includes technical annex when compliance_detail has results
Frontend correctly implements thermal drawer with all NormaCore reference data
test_credentials: Created temp test users via MongoDB (test-prev-*, test-ui-prev-*), all cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: None - all test data cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preventivi module fully tested. Key flows: 1) Create preventivo with lines, 2) Add thermal_data to line via drawer (glass/frame/spacer/zone), 3) Save triggers auto-compliance calculation, 4) Check-compliance endpoint validates against zone limits (Zone E = 1.30 W/m2K), 5) doppio_be_argon + steel frame gives Uw ~2.17 (NOT compliant), triplo_be_argon + PVC gives lower Uw (potentially compliant). PDF generation includes technical annex when compliance results exist.
